examples: Once I went to the storehouse to get a piece of new oilcloth.
I exchange a piece of new oilcloth, the piece in your hands now.
The lady asked me: "That's my story, so, do you want to take a look at this oilcloth."
Darrow jazzed up the graphics, laying out the board on a circular oilcloth, with colored bands at the top of each property grouping.
Edward forgot to bring the oilcloth- wrapped matches that he purchased for the trip, but they met a shoemaker on the river with enough to spare.
